roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR  APPEARING/3000ADM/X:ADMITS VIOLATION #1, BATTERY WITHOUT SERIOUS INJURY/3000REIN/PAJ: 90 DAYS//CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS VIOLATION/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 39 DAYS,/4019HALF/SA1:CALVIN TAN/SA2:1201 OCEAN AVE, SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:PC 4011,6 REPORT/NP/X:REFUSED COURT/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR  APPEARING/X: PAROLE AGENT DICKERSON  APPEARING/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/X:THE COURT ORDERS A PC 4011,6 REPORT TOCONFIRM THAT MR, BENOIT WILL BE RECEIVING LATUDA AS AN INJECTABLE AS OPPOSED TO A PILL,/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:10-28-21/S31/CONTD: PC 4011,6 REPORT/

CONTD PC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:10-21-21/S14/X:COURT REQUESTS INJECTABLE 20MG LATUDA BE EXPLORED AS ALREADY PRESRCIBED/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND TO SET/

/CAL:PAROLE PHC AND RECEIPT OF PC 4011,6 REPORT/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/X:PAROLE CASE MANAGER CHARLES BROWN IS PRESENT,/X:COURT IS IN RECEIPT OF PC 4011,6,/X:COURT ORDERS AN ADDITIONAL PC 4011,6 REPORT TO ADDRESS THE ISSUE OF THE MEDICATIONS,  THE REPORT INDICATES THAT MR, BENOITIS NOT TAKING ANY MEDICATION OR IS PRESCRIBED MEDICATION, COUNSEL REPRESENTS TO THE COURT THAT MR, BENOIT HAS BEEN PRESCRIBED THE FOLLOWING MEDS:MIRTAPAZINE & LATUDA,/X:THE COURT ALSO REQUESTS A CLARIFICATION AS TO THE DIAGNOSIS OF BIPOLAR DISORDER VS SCHIZOPHRENIA UNDIFFERENTIATED,/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:10-12-21/S31/CONTD:RECEIPT OF PC 4011,6 RPT AND PAROLE PHC/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT ON PAROLE 3056 PETITION/TN: SERGE M BENOIT JR/X: PAROLEAGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE ASTO THE ALLEGATIONS,/CTORD: PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/NB/X: TIME ISNOT WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING,/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:10-05-21/S/CTORD: BEFORENEXT CALLING OF THIS CASE, PAROLE SHALL PROVIDE TO DEFENSE COUNSEL RECORDS-REPORT RE DEFENDANT'S MENTAL HEALTH DIAGNOSIS, DEFENDANT'S MENTAL HEALTH TREATMENT NEEDS AND PAROLE'S TREATMENT PLAN/CONTD: PAROLE PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND RECEIPT OF 4011,6 REPORT/DOP/
